originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&pdata` is never used.

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_REGULATOR_MAX8660 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_OF () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 5: `*pdata++` in max8660_pdata_from_dt() (compiled when MAX8660=T AND OF=T). This is *(pdata++) — post-increment stores new value of local pointer pdata, which is never read again — dead store. No '// ERROR' at L5 (ERROR at L18 is at the call site max8660_pdata_from_dt(&pdata_of) in max8660_probe(), a different function/location). PC = MAX8660=T AND OF=T exactly matches the condition (OF=F uses the other function variant at L9-12 which lacks this dead store). Classification: TRUE_NEW.
